prompt: 用 idea-flow 帮我整理：我要用 React + TypeScript 重写我们的 jQuery 管理后台前端。

assertions.text: Response identifies that the user gave a solution (React+TS rewrite) rather than a problem
Response asks about the actual pain points with the jQuery admin panel (performance, maintenance, hiring, etc.)
Response does NOT immediately accept React+TS as the decided approach and start speccing
Response asks only ONE main question per message
Response explicitly redirects from solution-space back to problem-space
